2604.23931.title: Do Quantum Transformers Help? A Systematic VQC Architecture Comparison on Tabular Benchmarks
2604.23931.paper_summary: Variational quantum circuits (VQCs) are a leading approach to quantum machine learning on near-term devices, yet it remains unclear which circuit architecture yields the best accuracy-parameter trade-off on classical tabular data. We present a systematic empirical comparison of four VQC families -- multi-layer fully-connected (FC-VQC), residual (ResNet-VQC), hybrid quantum-classical transformer (QT), and fully quantum transformer (FQT) -- across five regression and classification benchmarks. Our key findings are: \textbf{(i)}~FC-VQCs achieve 90-96\% of the $R^2$ of attention-based VQCs while using 40-50\% fewer parameters, and consistently outperform equal-capacity MLPs (mean $R^2{=}0.829$ vs.\ MLP$_{720}$'s $0.753$ on Boston Housing, 3-seed average); \textbf{(ii)}~FC-VQC's Type~4 inter-block connectivity provides partial cross-token mixing that approximates the role of attention -- explicit quantum self-attention yields only marginal gains on most datasets while significantly increasing parameter count; \textbf{(iii)}~expressibility saturates at circuit depth~${\approx}\,3$, explaining why shallow VQCs already cover the Hilbert space effectively; \textbf{(iv)}~LayerNorm on the fully quantum transformer improves classification accuracy, suggesting normalization is important when all operations are quantum; \textbf{(v)}~in our noise study on Boston Housing, FQT degrades gracefully under depolarizing noise while QT collapses. All results are validated across three random seeds. These findings provide practical architectural guidance for deploying VQCs on near-term quantum hardware.
2604.23931.paper_summary_zh: 變分量子電路（VQCs）是針對近期設備的量子機器學習的主要方法，但目前尚不清楚哪種電路架構在經典表格數據上能達到最佳的準確度與參數權衡。我們對四種VQC家族進行了系統的實證比較——多層全連接（FC-VQC）、殘差（ResNet-VQC）、混合量子-經典Transformer（QT）和全量子Transformer（FQT）——在五個回歸和分類基準上進行比較。我們的主要發現是：\textbf{(i)}~FC-VQCs在使用40-50\%更少參數的情況下，達到了基於注意力的VQCs的90-96\%的$R^2$，並且在所有容量相等的MLPs中表現一致優於它們（平均$R^2{=}0.829$對比MLP$_{720}$的$0.753$，基於波士頓房價數據集，3次隨機種子平均）；\textbf{(ii)}~FC-VQC的類型4區塊間連接提供了部分跨標記混合，近似於注意力的角色——顯式的量子自注意力在大多數數據集上僅帶來邊際增益，同時顯著增加參數數量；\textbf{(iii)}~可表達性在電路深度約為3時飽和，這解釋了為什麼淺層VQCs已經能有效覆蓋希爾伯特空間；\textbf{(iv)}~在全量子Transformer上使用LayerNorm能提高分類準確度，這表明當所有操作都是量子時，正規化是重要的；\textbf{(v)}~在我們對波士頓房價的噪聲研究中，FQT在去極化噪聲下表現良好，而QT則崩潰。所有結果在三個隨機種子上得到了驗證。這些發現為在近期量子硬體上部署VQCs提供了實用的架構指導。
2604.23931.author: Chi-Sheng Chen et.al.
